changeSet.author: micko112
changeSet.sql: UPDATE category SET name = 'Detektor kablova za robotske kosilice' WHERE id = 1335

UPDATE ad SET category_id = ( SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM category WHERE name = 'Struja i agregati' AND parent_id = 100) AS tmp ) WHERE category_id = ( SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM category WHERE name = 'Tegljač kabla') AS tmp2 )
DELETE FROM category WHERE name = 'Tegljač kabla'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Sekač vijaka' WHERE name = 'Sekač zavrtnjeva'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Macola' WHERE name = 'Teški čekić'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Ankeri i tiplovi' WHERE name = 'Plug i klinovi'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Usisivač za lišće' WHERE name = 'Usisivač za pašnjak'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Rasipač za đubrivo' WHERE name = 'Razmetač'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Sokovnik na paru' WHERE name = 'Parna cediljka'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Nogari za farbanje' WHERE name = 'Konji za farbanje'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Grafoskop' WHERE name = 'Nadgledni projektor'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Stoni ger za drvo' WHERE name = 'Kosa testera'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Ručni ger za drvo' WHERE name = 'Ručna kosa testera'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Freza za panjeve' WHERE name = 'Mašina za panje'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Pobijač stubova' WHERE name = 'Čekić za stubove'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Štafelaj' WHERE name = 'Stativo za slikanje'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Mašinica za šišanje pasa' WHERE name = 'Šišač za pse'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Nargila' WHERE name = 'Nargilica'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Sanke' WHERE name = 'Saonice'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Fly jumpers' WHERE name = 'Flyjumpers'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Uglomer' WHERE name = 'Ugaomjer'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Ručno rende' WHERE name = 'Ručni rendač'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Stono rende' WHERE name = 'Stoni rendač'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Oscilirajući višenamenski alat / Multialat' WHERE id = 1038
UPDATE category SET name = 'Metar' WHERE name = 'Metrar'
UPDATE category SET name = 'Stega i mengel' WHERE name = 'Stega'

UPDATE ad SET category_id = (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM category WHERE name = 'Stega i mengel') AS tmp) WHERE category_id = (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM category WHERE name = 'Mengerica') AS tmp2)
DELETE FROM category WHERE name = 'Mengerica'

UPDATE category SET parent_id = ( SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM category WHERE name = 'Ručni alati' AND parent_id = 100) AS r ) WHERE name IN ('Skidač izolacije', 'Kalemovi i električni kablovi') AND parent_id = ( SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM category WHERE name = 'Struja i agregati' AND parent_id = 100) AS s )
